---
title: "Trishna Saikia"
pagetitle: "Trishna Saikia"
subtitle: "PhD Researcher in Computer Vision, Physiological Computing, and Healthcare AI"
image: assets/img/profile.jpg
image-alt: "Portrait of Trishna Saikia"

twitter-card:
  title: Trishna Saikia
  description: |
    PhD researcher working on machine learning, computer vision, multimodal learning, and physiological computing.
  image: assets/img/profile.jpg

about:
  template: solana
  image-width: 28em
  id: hero-heading
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      aria-label: "LinkedIn"
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/trishnasaikia/

    - icon: github
      aria-label: "GitHub"
      href: https://github.com/TrishnaSaikia

    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}}"
      aria-label: "Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=G6G8ir0AAAAJ

    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}}"
      aria-label: "ORCID"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3052-1689

    - text: "{{< fa envelope >}}"
      aria-label: "Email"
      href: mailto:trishnasaikia2521@gmail.com

page-layout: full

execute:
  freeze: false
  echo: false
  warning: false

header-includes: >
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/index.css">

resources:
  - assets/index.css
---

<br><br>

::: {#hero-heading}

I am a final-year PhD researcher in Computer Science and Engineering at **IIT Indore**, working at the intersection of **machine learning, computer vision, multimodal learning, and physiological computing**. My research focuses on developing AI systems that can extract physiological and behavioral information from videos and biosignals under real-world conditions.

My work includes remote physiological sensing for **heart rate, blood pressure, respiratory rate, oxygen saturation, and pain-related analysis**, with a focus on robust representation learning, temporal modeling, transformer architectures, multimodal fusion, and healthcare AI.

I am also a **Prime Minister Research Fellow (PMRF)** and a **Visiting Research Scholar at the University of Turku, Finland**, where I collaborate on AI and physiological computing research.

[Learn more about me &rarr;](about/){.about-links .subtitle}

:::
<!-- hero-heading -->
